_comment: Delhi Building Bylaws — Based on Master Plan for Delhi 2041 (MPD 2041) and NDMC Building Bye-Laws
_source: Delhi Development Authority (DDA) MPD 2041, Building Bye-Laws 2016
_units: All distances in metres (m), areas in sq.m, percentages as numbers (50 = 50%)

_notes: Applicable to plotted residential development (individual plots)
Rules vary by plot size — this is for 100-300 sq.m plots (most common category)
Front setback may be increased for plots on wider roads
FAR includes basement area (if any) — here simplified without basement

parking.notes: Mandatory for plots ≥ 100 sq.m. One ECS minimum per residential unit.

_notes: Local shopping centre / neighbourhood commercial zone
Higher FAR available for Mixed Use Zones — simplified here

parking.notes: 2 ECS per 100 sq.m of commercial floor area.
